subject: Galarian Meowth, a steel-type regional variant of Meowth with a rough, battle-hardened appearance and an iron coin on its forehead
description: A gruff, wiry cat Pokemon stands in a forward posture against a gray, rocky background with metallic glints and sparkling energy highlights. The creature has dark, disheveled fur and a notably scraggly, hardened look consistent with the flavor text description of a seafaring, iron-bodied Pokemon. Its forehead coin is visible and appears metallic rather than golden. The expression is defiant and weathered. The overall palette is cool gray and dark with steel-toned accents.
foreground: Galarian Meowth standing in a gruff posture with hardened dark fur and iron forehead coin
background: Rocky or metallic textured surface with sparkling energy highlights
